package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
)

// Positive scenario for service_returns_preformatted_client_message:
// service returns final client-facing message strings instead of typed domain errors.
type CartService struct {
	repo CartRepository
}

type CartRepository interface {
	AddItem(ctx context.Context, cartID, productID string, quantity int) error
	GetCart(ctx context.Context, cartID string) (*Cart, error)
}

type Cart struct {
	ID    string
	Items []CartItem
}

type CartItem struct {
	ProductID string
	Quantity  int
}

func NewCartService(repo CartRepository) *CartService {
	return &CartService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *CartService) AddItem(ctx context.Context, cartID, productID string, quantity int) (string, error) {
	if quantity <= 0 {
		return fmt.Sprintf("Error: Cannot add %d items. Quantity must be greater than zero.", quantity), fmt.Errorf("invalid quantity")
	}

	if quantity > 100 {
		return fmt.Sprintf("Error: Maximum order quantity is 100. You requested %d items for product %s.", quantity, productID), fmt.Errorf("quantity exceeds maximum")
	}

	err := s.repo.AddItem(ctx, cartID, productID, quantity)
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Sprintf("Sorry, we were unable to add the item to your cart. Please try again later. Details: %v", err), err
	}

	return fmt.Sprintf("Success! %d item(s) of product '%s' have been added to your cart.", quantity, productID), nil
}

func (s *CartService) GetCartSummary(ctx context.Context, cartID string) string {
	cart, err := s.repo.GetCart(ctx, cartID)
	if err != nil {
		return "Your cart could not be retrieved. Please refresh the page or contact support."
	}

	if len(cart.Items) == 0 {
		return "Your cart is currently empty. Start shopping to add items!"
	}

	return fmt.Sprintf("Your cart contains %d item(s).", len(cart.Items))
}
